consistency.class_alignment: Consistent. The feature explicitly names 'sorcerer' as the class.
consistency.level_alignment: Consistent. Listed as level 1, which is standard for core class features.
consistency.mechanic_description: Consistent. Clearly defines Charisma as the spellcasting ability and provides the standard formulas for Spell Save DC and Spell Attack Modifier used across 5th Edition.

quality.clarity: High. The description is direct, explaining the core mechanical function (Charisma for spellcasting, DC, and attack rolls).
quality.completeness: High. It includes the necessary formulas in a table format for quick reference, which is excellent for usability.
quality.formatting: Good. Uses a table structure for the formulas, improving readability compared to dense text.

formulas_verified.name: Spell save DC
formulas_verified.formula: 8 + your proficiency bonus + your Charisma modifier

formulas_verified.name: Spell attack modifier
formulas_verified.formula: your proficiency bonus + your Charisma modifier

mechanics.feature_type: Core Class Feature - Spellcasting Ability Definition

analysis.recommendations: None. This data accurately reflects the standard Player's Handbook feature for the Sorcerer class.
